phase: Phase 11 - Manual Pipeline Run And Batch Manifest Provenance

findings.finding: The referenced spec once included cleanup/reingest owner services. The live Kernel now keeps only manual pipeline run and batch manifest provenance.
findings.applied_detail: PipelineBatchAdapter exposes create_batch_manifest and finalize_batch_manifest only.

findings.finding: The referenced spec lists pipeline-facing surfaces, while the live surface removes continuation-scoped reingest.
findings.applied_detail: No reingest or cleanup tool is exposed through permanent, event-scoped or host-only Kernel surfaces.

findings.finding: The referenced internal contracts include the final batch manifest.
findings.applied_detail: Current Phase 11 fixtures cover pending/final batch manifest, correlation report and database reset manifest only.

findings.finding: Current Pipeline architecture supports the manifest provenance path required by manual_pipeline_run.
findings.applied_detail: Retired cleanup/reingest gaps are no longer modeled as missing capabilities.
